category_sources: source_facts.description says Dictionary Server Protocol RFC2229 client; official repository description says client/server software and tools supporting DICT protocol RFC 2229.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dict; official executables include dict and dictd; Homebrew formula name is dict.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository includes README and doc directory; source_facts.homepage is the official dict.org web interface.
repo_sources: FSF Free Software Directory and distro metadata identify https://github.com/cheusov/dictd as the developer VCS; SourceForge lists DICT Development Group maintainers and files but source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Dictionary Server Protocol RFC2229 client; official repository description mentions client/server software and tools supporting DICT protocol RFC 2229.
